maxUsageTooltip: The maximum number of times this coupon can be used across the entire platform.

campaignsPageIntro: Manage notifications, offers, and popup campaigns from one place.
createCampaignDescription: Choose the content type, then fill the notification or offer details shown to users.
createCampaignPageIntro: UI-only page for preparing notification and offer details before API integration.
notificationCampaignDescription: Send a notification with title, description, and incentive like discount or free delivery.
offerCampaignDescription: Show an image offer as a popup with store, product, zone, and timing controls.
campaignDescriptionPlaceholder: Write a clear message for users inside the app.
SearchProductToCopyDescription: Search by product name. The store name appears in parentheses, then the full product data is filled for editing before saving.
specialDeliveryTargetDescription: Sends users to the special delivery page and disables store, module, and products.
Weighted sizes helper description: Fully optional. Enter the kilo price and 4 kilo, half kilo, quarter kilo, and eighth kilo are calculated automatically. You can delete or edit any size.
couponZonesTooltip: Optional. Leave empty for a global coupon, or select zones to restrict delivery checkout usage.
campaignTitleRequired: Arabic and English campaign titles are required
campaignDescriptionRequired: Arabic and English notification descriptions are required
campaignStoreRequired: Store is required for this target type
campaignServiceRequired: Product is required for this target type
campaignEndAfterStartRequired: End time must be after start time
campaignDiscountValueRequired: Arabic and English discount values are required
notificationSendsImmediatelyNote: Notification campaigns are sent immediately on creation and are not re-sent on edit.
fortuneNameRequired: Arabic and English item names are required
fortuneDiscountRequired: Discount value must be from 1 to 100
fortuneFixedAmountRequired: Fixed amount value must be greater than zero
fortuneMinMaxInvalid: Min order amount must be less than or equal to max order amount
combinedDiscountHelper: Discount value can include coupon and fortune-wheel reward together.
freeDeliveryRewardKeepsTip: Delivery is free; the remaining shipping value can be the tip only as returned by the server.
applyTemplateDescription: Select a template to apply its categories and services to this store. Services will be created as PENDING.
assignStoreToCategory: Assign a store to this customer category
confirmUnassign: Are you sure you want to unassign this store?
noAssignedStores: No stores assigned to this category
